changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.comment: Create repeat_instance table used by ETL
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS repeat_instance ( id varchar(26) PRIMARY KEY, parent_repeat_instance_id varchar(26), repeat_section_label jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, submission_id varchar(50) NOT NULL, category_kind varchar(200), category_id varchar(200), category_name varchar(200), category_label jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb, repeat_path varchar(3000) NOT NULL, repeat_index bigint, client_updated_at timestamp, deleted_at timestamp, submission_completed_at timestamp, created_date timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), last_modified_date timestamp, last_modified_by varchar(100), created_by varchar(100) );

changeSet.author: hamza (generated)
changeSet.comment: Create element_data_value and unique index used by the ETL
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS element_data_value ( id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, submission_id varchar(50) NOT NULL, assignment_id varchar(50), team_id varchar(50), org_unit_id varchar(50), activity_id varchar(50), element_id varchar(200) NOT NULL, element_config_id bigint NOT NULL, element_label jsonb, repeat_instance_id varchar(26), option_id varchar(100), -- only for multi select or null value_text text, value_num numeric, value_bool boolean, value_ref varchar(26), value_ts timestamp, deleted_at timestamp, created_date timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), last_modified_date timestamp, repeat_instance_key text GENERATED ALWAYS AS (COALESCE(repeat_instance_id, '')) STORED, selection_key text GENERATED ALWAYS AS (COALESCE(option_id, '')) STORED, row_type char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'S' );
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ux_element_value_unique ON element_data_value ( submission_id, element_id, repeat_instance_key, row_type, selection_key );
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_element_data_value_submission_repeat ON element_data_value(submission_id, repeat_instance_id);
